title: Borrower servicing journey map
prompt: Create a 16:9 light premium borrower servicing journey map visual for TSI Loan Servicing / UAS-inspired storytelling, without using any product logos. Mostly white surface with cool blue tint panels, TSI dark blue #001E41 path structure, TSI bright blue #4396F6 active journey line, small green completion indicators, and restrained orange exception notes. Show abstract borrower journey stages as generic icons/cards, no readable personal data, no account numbers. Elegant, spacious, premium, modern, suitable for a web hero or deck slide. Leave upper-left logo-safe space. No logos, no fake data, no names, no watermarks, no distressed people.
notes: Contains generic generated labels; production text should be rebuilt outside the image when precision matters.
package_asset_policy: full-resolution PNG omitted from compact package; use bundled WebP preview for visual reference and regenerate from prompt metadata for production use.
